rationale: The proposed change modifies Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. Fam. Code §52.04 governs juvenile court referral procedures and is entirely unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
quote: The following shall accompany referral of a child or a child's case to the office or official designated by the juvenile board or be provided as quickly as possible after referral:
_note: No relationship between proposed Tax Code homestead exemption change and Fam. Code juvenile referral procedures.
